### 📦 Third-Party Update

**Package Updated**
e.g., `lodash@4.17.21` → `4.18.0`

**Changelog / Release Notes**
Link to upstream changelog if available.

**Compatibility**
- [ ] Breaking changes reviewed
- [ ] Project still builds/passes tests

**Checklist**
- [ ] Tested in local/dev
- [ ] Security implications reviewed
